def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  n = prices.length
  original_profit = 0
  n.times do |i|
    original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  prefix_prices = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_prices[i+1] = prefix_prices[i] + prices[i]
  end

  prefix_strategy = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_strategy[i+1] = prefix_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  max_gain = 0
  (0...n - k + 1).each do |i|
    original_contribution = prefix_strategy[i + k] - prefix_strategy[i]

    sum_second = prefix_prices[end_second] - prefix_prices[start_second]
    gain = sum_second - original_contribution
    max_gain = [max_gain, gain].max
  end

  result = original_profit + max_gain if max_gain > 0
  result ||= original_profit
  result
end

    original_contribution = prefix_strategy[i + k] - prefix_strategy[i]
    start_second = i + k / 2
    end_second = i + k
    sum_second = prefix_prices[end_second] - prefix_prices[start_second]
    gain = sum_second - original_contribution
    max_gain = [max_gain, gain].max
  end

  result = original_profit + max_gain if max_gain > 0
  result ||= original_profit
  result
end
